flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hampton University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hampton University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 3.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hampton University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (39.7% → 44.3%).
